_comment: Example club info — the SINGLE club-info record (about/history/contact/socials). Copy to club-info.json. All text is Croatian (hr). officers/socials are small lists. historyPhotos = the founders/roots gallery. officerRoleLabels maps each officer's roleKey to a Croatian label; photoCaptions maps each history photo (by its 'key' here) to a caption.
_notes: officers[].roleKey must appear in officerRoleLabels. historyPhotos[].key must appear in photoCaptions (the importer keys captions by photo). socials.platform = lowercase key (facebook/instagram/...). Only ONE club-info record exists (singleton).
